title: viola corallensis
intro: Viola corallensis, also known as the Coral Pansy or Coral Violet, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Viola corallensis include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
